_comment: Each dimension: 5 pts if ANY signal word appears in title+text+tags. Max 25. Edit signals freely.

novelty.label: New tools & product launches
novelty.description: New tools, OSS releases, product launches, and major feature drops

practicality.label: Practical use cases & real-world applications
practicality.description: Business use cases, meeting tools, workflow automation, things someone can actually do — not pure engineering research

evidence.label: Evidence & results
evidence.description: Demos, working repos, ROI numbers, before/after results — not just theory

content_value.label: Writing & insight value
content_value.description: Opinions, learnings, surveys, comparisons, explainers — things worth reading and writing about

japan_fit.label: Japan market specifics
japan_fit.description: Japan-only tools, enterprise/SMB Japan adoption, Japanese-language AI, culturally specific use cases

_tuning_notes: Threshold 10/25 = any 2 dimensions hit. Raise to 15 to tighten. Lower to 5 to see everything.
top_n controls how many posts appear in the digest and on the website.
Add to practicality signals to catch more non-engineer use-case content.
Add to content_value signals to catch more blog/newsletter-worthy analysis.
All scoring is keyword-based (binary per dimension). Semantic scoring requires Claude API summarize step.
